title: AgentOutput
description: Required Gemini response shape after parsing. Keys align with agents/linkedin-writer.json output_schema.

deliverable_markdown.description: One valid deliverable in markdown: a blocker question, three angle options, or the selected final English LinkedIn post

resumo.description: 2-3 sentence summary of the returned blocker, angles, or final post

autochecagem.description: Bullet list validating the output against the brief, evidence requirements, Wolven voice, and acceptance criteria
